statement: On creatorbench-v1.4, covering 1392 private held-out workflow instances from 50 creator-disjoint sources across 6 workflows, NodeVideo routed 49.4% to human review and safely abstained in 50.6%. No automatic or assisted usability claim is made because only 0/1392 results have human review. Editing-quality silent-failure incidence remains unverified.
limitations: No result is classified usable until a rendered artifact is blindly reviewed by a human.
This baseline measures request ingestion, rights validation, route eligibility, and honest non-success states—not editing quality.
Editing-quality silent-failure incidence is unverified: 0/1392 private held-out results have human review.
